name: Raspberry Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix together all of the ingredients.
2. Cook over medium heat for about 5 minutes until the sauce is slightly thickened.
Cook: Stephen Abel, Delaware
Source: "Chicken Cookery" - 1994 Delmarva Chicken Cooking Contest
